title: Farming and Countryside Programme annual report 2024 to 2025
body: "The Agriculture Act (2020) places a duty on the Secretary of State for Environment, Food and Rural Affairs to lay and publish an annual report providing information about the financial assistance given as part of the Farming and Countryside Programme.  This is the fourth of those reports and relates to financial year 2024 to 2025, the fourth year of the agricultural transition. "
